mano_cua.result_summary: 应用始终显示 CONNECT TO GATEWAY 连接对话框，需要 WebSocket 网关 (ws://127.0.0.1:18789) 才能访问 Dashboard/Skills 页面。左侧边栏显示 Failed to load file tree 错误，CONNECT 按钮无效果。后端未运行导致无法访问目标功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The URL changed to /skills but the same CONNECT TO GATEWAY dialog is still showing. This confirms that the application is a Single Page Application that always shows the CONNECT TO GATEWAY dialog as the entry point. The application requires a working backend gateway connection (WebSocket at ws://127.0.0.1:18789) to function. Without that connection, no Dashboard or Skills features are accessible. Result: unclear - 未在页面中找到目标功能入口。
